details: The scheme "Pandit Omkarnath Music Competition" was launched by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to honour the memory of Pandit Omkarnath and promote classical music among young artists by organizing competitive platforms for singing, vocal, and percussion performances, addressing the need to nurture and recognize classical music talent in the state. The scheme is implemented by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities, Gujarat. The applications for this scheme are accepted offline.
benefits: Classical music artists are provided with the opportunity to participate in organized competitions for singing, vocal, and percussion performances.
Competitions are organized separately for two age categories: 12 to 19 years and 20 to 35 years, ensuring age-appropriate competition levels.
The scheme provides a platform for recognition and promotion of classical music talent in the state of Gujarat.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant must be between 12 to 19 years of age or between 20 to 35 years of age.
The applicant must be a classical music artist.
The applicant must specialize in singing, vocal performance, or percussion instruments.

offline: Visit the official website of 'Mari Yojana' at
In the search bar provided at the top of the page, type 'Competition'. All the schemes of the Government of Gujarat having the word 'Competition' will be listed.

From the list, click on the scheme 'Solo Drama Competition'. You will be taken to the schemes page. Navigate and download the application form of the scheme. The application form is available in both Gujarati and English languages, and the applicant should take print of the form in their preferred language.

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across, if required), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents, within the prescribed period (if any), to the designated authority at the Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy.

After successful submission, the applicant will receive an acknowledgement or reference number. The applicant should save this reference number for future correspondence and tracking of the application status.

documents_required: Age Proof Document (Birth Certificate, School Leaving Certificate, Aadhaar Card, or Any Government-Issued Identity Document).
Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card or Any Government-Issued Photo Identity Document).
Proof of Residence in Gujarat (Domicile Certificate, Ration Card, or Utility Bills).
Proof of Classical Music Training or Performance Experience (Certificates from Music Institutions, Performance Records, or Teacher Recommendations).
sources_and_references: Official Website Of Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy
